[vc_row css=”.vc_custom_1500556319702{background-color: #eeeeec !important;}”][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-2 vc_col-lg-8 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-10″]

[vc_column_text]

Hood Builder is your ideal destination for the installation and servicing of all makes and models of exhaust hood fans. For the last 25 years, we have been helping a wide range of commercial kitchens, restaurant facilities and food service centers run their ventilation hood system with full efficiency.

Free Quote 303-777-7720

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column]
[/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-7 vc_col-md-7″][vc_column_text]

Ventilation Hood Exhaust Fans in Denver, CO

With a large volume of cooking done on a regular basis, commercial kitchens gather a lot of grease and grime over time. These deposits enhance the risk of a potential fire as well as fill the facility with stale odors. This is exactly why you need to have the kitchen ventilation hoods in excellent shape.

Most of all, you should pay attention to the functioning of the hood exhaust fans. If the fan works with utmost efficiency, the system will be able to effectively ventilate the facility and keep it fresh. Though hood fans perform such a crucial role, they often get ignored in many commercial kitchens. If you are a smart facility manager, you should always ensure that the kitchen exhaust fan stays clean and functions in a proper manner to deliver the best results. With a highly qualified and skilled team of experts by your side, it will become easier to perform the exhaust fan installation, repair, and cleaning in a professional manner.

At Hood Builder, we offer the most effective exhaust fan solutions for your restaurant or hospitality business. For over 25 years, we have been providing some of the biggest names in the restaurant industry with exhaust fans that are efficient, built-to-last, and completely affordable.

Exhaust Fan Installation

Installing a range hood fan in a large kitchen is a process, which requires a great deal of attention to detail and skills. It involves the selection of the right fan size and model, cutting out vents in the wall, and setting up the duct system. Therefore, you should always seek the help of professional hood builders to get the exhaust fan installation done in a correct and precise manner.

If you are opening a new food service facility or the existing fan of your kitchen’s exhaust unit has been damaged beyond repair, you will need to replace it with a new one. Our expertly trained technicians will conduct an evaluation of your specific needs, choose the most ideal location for the fan installation, and then carry out the entire procedure exactly as per your needs. If your exhaust fan is not properly installed, you will face various kinds of issues with the system’s overall efficiency and need to spend money again and again to fix them.

At Hood Builder, we have sound expertise in the installation of all makes and models of exhaust food fans. From taking measurements to installing the fans, you can always rely on our extensive experience.

Exhaust Fan Cleaning and Repair

Before the exhaust fan in your kitchen needs a repair, you will notice some signs to know there is something wrong. While it is crucial to give the exhaust hood fan proper cleaning in a timely manner, it is even more important to spot the warning signs, which make a repair necessary.

Watch out for these signs to know if a repair is required:

  • The hood fan makes a rattling sound
  • A strange, loud tone comes from the motor
  • The exhaust system fails to start

All these are key signs you might have a problem with the exhaust fan. If you notice any of these signs, you should head straight to Hood Builder to schedule a repair, so that your business operation does not get disrupted. Our highly qualified and proficient tech team will quickly diagnose the problem and carry out the hood fan repairs to restore the efficiency of your exhaust system.

We Offer the Exhaust Fans You Need

Hood Builder has ventilation fans available in a variety of sizes and motor horsepower configurations designed for your specific application. These belt-driven exhaust fans come with durable, galvanized steel blades that can handle large volumes of air at low static pressures. We also offer vertical roof and horizontal mount wall configurations. All our vent hood exhaust fans feature variable pitches and adjustable pulleys to optimize performance as per need.

If you require direct-drive models, we also offer those in a wide variety of sizes and airflows to suit the specific needs of your commercial kitchen. These high-performance exhaust fans come with polypropylene propellers and fiberglass frame construction for corrosion resistance.

In short, when you want the best exhaust fans in the industry, choose Hood Builder. We offer UL-762 compliant fans, all of which provide you with state-of-the-art ventilation systems.

All Quality Makes and Models

  • Exhaust fans – roof up blast and sidewall
  • Roof curbs
  • Utility set fans
  • Exhaust fan – inline grease and non-grease
  • Ceiling and cabinet fans
  • Roof exhaust

If you want to know which type, size, or model of exhaust fan will be best to install for your commercial kitchen, you should reach out to one of our specialists at Hood Builder for your free consultation.

Cleaner Air and Energy Savings

Our exhaust fans are designed for sustained performance, allowing you to go about business as usual with fresh, clean air. Cleaner air makes for a stellar customer experience. Patrons won’t mind dining longer when your environment is sanitary and cozy. Most of all, a safe and healthy atmosphere will encourage the kitchen staff to deliver their best consistently. In a nutshell, well-maintained exhaust fans will ultimately increase your company’s bottom line.

Our premium exhaust fans are also constructed to conserve energy. You can run them longer with more savings for the long term.

Do You Have Issues with Your Exhaust Hood Fan?

If you are looking for an ideal partner to keep your ventilation system in great shape at all times, Hood Builder is the right choice. Our exhaust fan services go much beyond installation, repair, and cleaning. Our certified technicians are highly proficient in exhaust fan repair, hood fan installation, fan belt servicing, fan hinges repair, hood, and duct cleaning, fan motor repair, etc. 

If you operate a commercial kitchen or a large food facility in Denver, Colorado, we are only a phone call away. You can also reach out to us by sending us an email via the contact form given on our website.

 

Free Quote 303-777-7720

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column offset=”vc_col-lg-offset-1 vc_col-lg-4 vc_col-md-offset-1 vc_col-md-4″][vc_wp_custommenu nav_menu=”11″ el_class=”wps-sidebar-related-links” title=”Related Links”]

[/vc_column][vc_column]
[/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width=”wps-full-width”][vc_column]
Get a Free Quote

We’ve got you covered. Hood Builder is a leading distribution, fabrication, and installation company for food facilities of any size. We have offices and plants across the United States that are ready to tend to your needs.

If you intend on receiving quotes from other installers in the industry, please be sure to compare the items included in the package in addition to price and reputation. Our objective is to always be your obvious choice. Please fill out the form below and and we will prepare a quote.

For a Full and Fast price Quote, Contact Hood Builder today at 303-777-7720.


    Please prove you are human by selecting the plane.

    [/vc_column][/vc_row]
